name: The Commonwealth

ent.admins:
admins:
adminsys:
adminlevel:
adminname: union of states

ent.description:
description:
div: The Commonwealth is a voluntary association of 56 independent and equal countries. It is home to 2.5 billion people, and includes both advanced economies and developing countries. 33 of our members are small states, including many island nations.

ent.names:
names:
name: The Asian Continent name: Der asiatische Kontinent

ent.description:
description:
div: Given the geographical uncertainty of the borders of the Asian continent, this unit serves mainly as a rough classification of sites in European, Asian or other continents. No geographic claims are implied here.

name: The European Continent

ent.description:
description:
div: Given the geographical uncertainty of the borders of the European continent, this unit serves mainly as a rough classification of sites in European, Asian or other continents. No geographic claims are implied here.

description:
div: The European Union is an economic, political, military and financial union of European states. Sites in the following countries have been documented so far:: tmlDocBelgium.xml
